SMILE INDEX: 1
WINDOW: 121.700s to 157.833s (smile at 141.700s to 142.833s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[98.525-150.730] interviewee: a baby. The doctor gave up. He said I would not live. So my grandmother bundled me up and took me to her hometown. And I was a raised for almost four years by my grandparents. I didn't know my parents. They came from time to time to visit us. But there were other sisters and brothers who came. So I did not.
[150.730-155.646] interviewer: They are readjusting the lens.
[155.646-157.080] interviewer: OK, go.
[157.080-434.930] interviewee: In 1915,

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
parents.
